title: Dawn Era Biome Mod Compat
description: Adds compatability between The Dawn Era and every biome mod
body:
Dawn Era Biome Compat adds compatability between any version of "The Dawn Era" including the leaked 0.68 version and any biome mod.

It does this quite unefficently cince its made in mcreator with all its limitations so what is does essentially is it spawns a entity one for each dinosaur and then it spawns it and despawns.

Its main problem is its performance cutting the performance on my Modpack by about 1/4th.

It also enforces some crafting recipies for Sector 12
